textPlain: I wish the authors calculated a plot of model size (number of params) vs number of triples it can hold before the memory collapse happens.It's hard to map the frequency of knowledge injection to a real world understanding of "how much knowledge" can a 4B param model hold?
I wonder if this depends on what is inside the domain specific data.I’m happy to see ML papers on hacker news.
There is a study that gives a rule of thumb of ~2 bits per param for a model's memorization capacity: https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.05405
